request.description: Lists the members of a group on Zoom.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Group ID.
The amount of records returns within a single API call. Defaults to 30.
Current page number of returned records. Default to 1.
(Required) Group name, must be unique in one account.
Group type, Normal: normal group, Restricted: Restricted group, Shared: Shared group.
Others in the same email domain can search members.
Others under same account can search members.
Others under same master account, including all sub accounts can search members.
